query:
CREATE TABLE `passwordResetTokens` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`token` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`used` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `passwordResetTokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `passwordResetTokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 5wwPyhjRUjVTo9s.root --database kYpwHKpJafrLckpe6FrLBC --execute CREATE TABLE `passwordResetTokens` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`token` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`used` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `passwordResetTokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `passwordResetTokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);
